item.title: WWII Veterans Recall Combat Experience
item.description: World War II veterans reflect on what combat felt like, sharing firsthand memories of service, survival, and the realities of war.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veterans Recall Combat Experience
media:content.media:description: World War II veterans reflect on what combat felt like, sharing firsthand memories of service, survival, and the realities of war.

item.title: Rudy Meekins and a Korean War Memory
item.description: U.S. Marine Corps veteran Rudy Meekins earned four Purple Hearts in the Korean War. One lasting memory is of a Korean boy who traded a handmade flag for a can of beans.

media:content.media:title: Rudy Meekins and a Korean War Memory
media:content.media:description: U.S. Marine Corps veteran Rudy Meekins earned four Purple Hearts in the Korean War. One lasting memory is of a Korean boy who traded a handmade flag for a can of beans.

item.title: The Joke I Told a German POW
item.description: A veteran recalls a brief wartime encounter with a German POW and the joke he told, offering a personal glimpse into military history.

media:content.media:title: The Joke I Told a German POW
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls a brief wartime encounter with a German POW and the joke he told, offering a personal glimpse into military history.

item.title: Surviving a Viet Cong Firefight
item.description: A firsthand account of surviving a violent Viet Cong firefight, reflecting on combat, service, and the realities faced by soldiers in Vietnam.

media:content.media:title: Surviving a Viet Cong Firefight
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of surviving a violent Viet Cong firefight, reflecting on combat, service, and the realities faced by soldiers in Vietnam.

item.title: An Incredible Story of Humanity During War
item.description: A wartime story centered on humanity, service, and the human cost of conflict.

media:content.media:title: An Incredible Story of Humanity During War
media:content.media:description: A wartime story centered on humanity, service, and the human cost of conflict.

item.title: Douglas Dillard’s Lifetime of Military Service
item.description: Douglas Dillard joined the U.S. Army at 16 and served through World War II, Korea, and Vietnam. He reflects on courage, sacrifice, and a lifetime of service.

media:content.media:title: Douglas Dillard’s Lifetime of Military Service
media:content.media:description: Douglas Dillard joined the U.S. Army at 16 and served through World War II, Korea, and Vietnam. He reflects on courage, sacrifice, and a lifetime of service.

item.title: The Silence That Screamed an Unseen Storm
item.description: A reflective military history story from the American Veterans Center, exploring the meaning behind a powerful wartime silence and the unseen strain it carried.

media:content.media:title: The Silence That Screamed an Unseen Storm
media:content.media:description: A reflective military history story from the American Veterans Center, exploring the meaning behind a powerful wartime silence and the unseen strain it carried.

item.title: Memorial Day Parade Honors Fallen Heroes
item.description: On Constitution Avenue in Washington, D.C., the National Memorial Day Parade honored the brave men and women who gave everything for our country.

media:content.media:title: Memorial Day Parade Honors Fallen Heroes
media:content.media:description: On Constitution Avenue in Washington, D.C., the National Memorial Day Parade honored the brave men and women who gave everything for our country.

item.title: We Thought the Germans Were Using Gas
item.description: A veteran recalls the fear of believing German gas was being used, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the front lines.

media:content.media:title: We Thought the Germans Were Using Gas
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls the fear of believing German gas was being used, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the front lines.

item.title: His Last Act Saves Squadron
item.description: A wartime story of courage and sacrifice, honoring a final act that protected fellow airmen and shaped the squadron’s survival.

media:content.media:title: His Last Act Saves Squadron
media:content.media:description: A wartime story of courage and sacrifice, honoring a final act that protected fellow airmen and shaped the squadron’s survival.

item.title: A Wartime Surprise in a Nazi Pillow
item.description: A veteran reflects on an unexpected discovery tied to wartime history, offering a brief firsthand glimpse into the past.

media:content.media:title: A Wartime Surprise in a Nazi Pillow
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on an unexpected discovery tied to wartime history, offering a brief firsthand glimpse into the past.

item.title: Marines Remember a Friend at Arlington
item.description: Don Graves and Billy Byrd reflect on Ira Hayes, their close friend and fellow Marine who helped raise the flag on Iwo Jima and was later laid to rest at Arlington.

media:content.media:title: Marines Remember a Friend at Arlington
media:content.media:description: Don Graves and Billy Byrd reflect on Ira Hayes, their close friend and fellow Marine who helped raise the flag on Iwo Jima and was later laid to rest at Arlington.

item.title: The Most Feared Marines
item.description: A historical look at the Marines and the reputation they earned through service, discipline, and combat experience.

media:content.media:title: The Most Feared Marines
media:content.media:description: A historical look at the Marines and the reputation they earned through service, discipline, and combat experience.
